mnemonics: McGraw-Hill: My Guide Creates Reliable Ways, Handling Information Logically Lays Learning
keyPoints: McGraw-Hill is a publisher, not a data structure itself.
This module likely covers data structures from a McGraw-Hill textbook.
The specific data structures discussed would be listed in the module's content.
commonMistakes: Mistaking 'McGraw-Hill' for the name of a specific data structure (like a tree or list).
Focusing on the publisher's name instead of the actual data structure concepts presented in the module.
